deploy.startCommand: php artisan storage:link --force ; php artisan migrate --force ; php artisan db:seed --force ; php artisan config:cache ; php artisan route:cache ; if [ ! -z "$FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_B64" ]; then echo $FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_B64 | base64 -d > storage/app/firebase-service-account.json; fi ; php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
